section_title: Interpretation.-- For the purposes of the foregoing provisions of this Part--

sub_sections.text: the expression "director" includes any person occupying the position of director by whatever name called.
the expression "prospectus" has the same meaning as when used in relation to a company incorporated under this Act;
the expression "place of business" includes a share transfer or share registration office;
the expression "secretary" includes any person occupying the position of secretary, by whatever name called and
the expression "certified" means certified in the prescribed manner to be a true copy or a correct translation.
